title: [CI:BUILD] Packit: Adjustments for Cockpit reverse-dependency check
body:
Please see the two individual commit messages for details. This will robustify the test against [unrelated non-fatal unexpected message checks](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/faf29d9a-0219-47fb-bef4-6d2a151de209/), seen in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19741.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Awesome, someone [broke c8s+epel-next-8](https://download.copr.fedorainfracloud.org/results/packit/containers-podman-19753/centos-stream+epel-next-8-x86_64/06344079-podman/builder-live.log.gz):
```
 Problem 1: cannot install the best candidate for the job
  - nothing provides glibc-devel = 2.28-234.el8 needed by glibc-static-2.28-234.el8.x86_64 from powertools
 Problem 2: cannot install the best candidate for the job
  - nothing provides shadow-utils-subid = 2:4.6-19.el8 needed by shadow-utils-subid-devel-2:4.6-19.el8.x86_64 from powertools
```
Unrelated, and I can't retry tests here anyway, so I'll leave it at that.

@lsm5 do you mind reviewing? Thanks!
i've notified copr folks about it already. We can ignore those for now.
@martinpitt will review in a bit, thanks

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *martinpitt* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [lsm5] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@martinpitt did you mean you didn't have permission to run `slash-packit` commands here?

@lsm5: new pull request created: #19756

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19753#issuecomment-1693877527):

>/cherry-pick v4.6


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
@lsm5 ah, slash-packit may have worked, but I am not allowed to do the Re-run action in the packit status view

> @lsm5 ah, slash-packit may have worked, but I am not allowed to do the Re-run action in the packit status view

@martinpitt ack. don't know if you need to be in the OWNERS file for it, or if this is a thing packit could solve on their side. I'll ask around.
